g.text: N+1 vs DataLoader -- request-scoped batching and dedup
Same 100 venue resolver calls. Naive: 100 DB queries. DataLoader: 1 batched query for 12 distinct IDs.
...100 venue resolvers, each calling DB independently
With DataLoader -- batched within one tick + deduplicated per request
DataLoader queue (collects IDs in the same tick)
SELECT * FROM venues WHERE id IN (12 IDs)
